message:
chore: update beads issue tracker state

Sync beads issue metadata with latest status changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-h6nz.5.2","title":"Expand benchmark suite for mount latency, write amplification, and contention paths","description":"## Objective
Close blind spots in current perf coverage by adding benchmarks for operationally critical paths not fully represented in existing suites.

## Scope
1. Mount/open latency with validation/recovery variations.
2. Write-path benchmarks capturing amplification and commit overhead.
3. Contention benchmarks for multi-writer + snapshot-heavy scenarios.
4. Scrub/repair overhead benchmarks under mixed workload.

## Acceptance Criteria
- New benchmarks produce stable baseline artifacts.
- Bench outputs include enough metadata to compare across host profiles.
- Added suites are integrated into baseline recording workflow.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:38.864493595Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T08:03:49.103503431Z","closed_at":"2026-03-04T08:03:49.103481610Z","close_reason":"Expanded benchmark suite: 9 new operations added (write amplification x2, contention x3, scrub x2, RaptorQ codec x2). Created ffs-repair/benches/scrub_codec.rs (4 Criterion benches). Extended ffs-mvcc/benches/wal_throughput.rs (5 new bench functions). Updated taxonomy, thresholds.toml, benchmark_record.sh, scenario_catalog.json. E2E script: 5 scenarios. All gates: 75/75 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_benchmarking","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:38.864493595Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:38.864493595Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":312,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add/extend crate-local unit tests for happy path, edge/boundary cases, and error paths.
- Include at least one negative/invariant test proving the failure mode is handled intentionally.

2. E2E Scripts (required)
- Add/extend deterministic E2E coverage under scripts/e2e/ (or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- E2E output must include machine-parseable pass/fail markers and scenario identifiers.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Add structured logs at key state transitions and error boundaries (debug/info/warn/error as appropriate).
- Log fields must include operation/scenario identifiers so incidents are traceable.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) that verify critical log markers are emitted for success and failure paths.

4. Validation Gates (required)
- Run via rch where applicable: cargo fmt/check/clippy/test + targeted E2E script(s).
- Closure comment must summarize test evidence and logging-evidence locations.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:58:39Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","title":"Implement statistically robust regression comparator with anti-flake hysteresis","description":"## Objective
Replace simplistic threshold-only comparisons with a regression gate that accounts for noise, effect size, and repeated confirmation before failing builds.

## Scope
1. Comparator model using confidence/effect-size thresholds.
2. Hysteresis or multi-run confirmation for borderline regressions.
3. Human-readable failure output with likely root-cause dimensions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Comparator catches synthetic regressions while suppressing expected noise.
- CI output includes workload, metric, baseline, delta, and confidence context.
- False-positive rate is measurably reduced versus prior guard.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:43.521323680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T08:39:02.042017603Z","closed_at":"2026-03-04T08:38:46.822111118Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_benchmarking","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:43.521323680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:43.521323680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:43.521323680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":311,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add/extend crate-local unit tests for happy path, edge/boundary cases, and error paths.
- Include at least one negative/invariant test proving the failure mode is handled intentionally.

2. E2E Scripts (required)
- Add/extend deterministic E2E coverage under scripts/e2e/ (or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- E2E output must include machine-parseable pass/fail markers and scenario identifiers.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Add structured logs at key state transitions and error boundaries (debug/info/warn/error as appropriate).
- Log fields must include operation/scenario identifiers so incidents are traceable.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) that verify critical log markers are emitted for success and failure paths.

4. Validation Gates (required)
- Run via rch where applicable: cargo fmt/check/clippy/test + targeted E2E script(s).
- Closure comment must summarize test evidence and logging-evidence locations.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:58:38Z"},{"id":354,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed: 33 unit tests pass, 125/125 ffs-harness tests, clippy clean, fmt clean. Created perf_comparison.rs with Welch t-test, Cohen d, hysteresis tracker, envelope integration.","created_at":"2026-03-04T08:39:02Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","title":"Benchmark degraded/backpressure runtime behavior under load","description":"## Objective
Quantify how graceful-degradation and backpressure mechanisms affect latency and throughput during overload conditions.

## Scope
1. Synthetic pressure scenarios (CPU, memory, I/O queue pressure).
2. Measure foreground workload behavior while background tasks are throttled.
3. Compare behavior across runtime modes (standard vs managed/per-core where available).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Report includes p50/p95/p99 deltas under each pressure class.
- Results identify acceptable and unacceptable degradation envelopes.
- Data feeds default policy tuning and docs.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:51.729994Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T22:56:25.102502161Z","closed_at":"2026-03-04T22:56:25.102430596Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_benchmarking","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:03:17.414392179Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:35.732900637Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:51.729994Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:51.729994Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":332,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

- Closure comment must summarize test evidence and logging-evidence locations.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:58:43Z"},{"id":356,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed: degraded-mode benchmark infrastructure. Added 8 degraded-mode taxonomy entries (6 throughput + 1 FSM tick + 1 contention), criterion benches in degraded_pressure.rs (warning/critical throughput, FSM tick, 4-thread contention), 5 unit tests (pressure levels, concurrent checks, escalation order), E2E scenario. 336 tests pass, clippy+fmt clean.","created_at":"2026-03-04T22:56:21Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","title":"Create performance regression triage runbook with decision tree","description":"## Objective
Translate benchmark guard output into an operator workflow that quickly distinguishes real regressions from environmental noise.

## Scope
1. Decision tree for parser-path vs runtime-path vs environment-caused regressions.
2. Required evidence checklist before reverting or tuning thresholds.
3. Links to scripts/commands used for confirmation runs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Runbook enables a new agent/operator to execute triage end-to-end.
- Includes concrete command sequences and expected artifacts.
- Stored near benchmark tooling and referenced by guard failure output.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)

- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:56.253123610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-04T23:00:54.991062022Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_benchmarking","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:56.253123610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:56.253123610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:56.253123610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":331,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:56.253123610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-05T00:22:14.797433194Z","closed_at":"2026-03-05T00:22:14.797330371Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_benchmarking","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:56.253123610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:56.253123610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:51:56.253123610Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":331,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

1. Unit Tests (required)

- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) that verify critical log markers are emitted for success and failure paths.

4. Validation Gates (required)
- Run via rch where applicable: cargo fmt/check/clippy/test + targeted E2E script(s).
- Closure comment must summarize test evidence and logging-evidence locations.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:58:43Z"},{"id":357,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed: performance regression triage runbook and decision helper module.

## Deliverables
1. **Runbook:** docs/runbooks/perf-regression-triage.md
   - Full decision tree: noise → insufficient data → not significant → negligible effect → family classification
   - Evidence checklist before reverting or tuning thresholds
   - Concrete command sequences for confirmation runs
   - Default acceptance envelope table by family
   - Key file location reference

2. **Triage module:** crates/ffs-harness/src/perf_triage.rs
   - TriageCause enum (Noise, InsufficientData, NotSignificant, NegligibleEffect, CodeRegression, EnvironmentChange, ThresholdCalibration)
   - TriageAction enum (NoAction, CollectMoreSamples, RerunOnReference, BisectCommits, CheckEnvironment, RecalibrateThresholds)
   - classify_triage() maps ComparisonResult + family + hysteresis → TriageDecision
   - Structured logging at triage decision points (operation_id, scenario_id, outcome, cause, action)
   - TRIAGE_VERSION=1 for contract versioning

3. **Unit tests:** 13 tests in perf_triage module + 2 taxonomy integration tests
   - Happy path: noise, inconclusive, fail-parser-bisect, fail-mount-env, warn-no-block, not-significant-rerun
   - Edge cases: high-CV-recalibration, large-effect-bisect
   - Negative/invariant: version positive, all-families-valid, JSON round-trip, hysteresis-blocking logic

4. **E2E scenarios:** 2 new scenarios in ffs_smoke.sh + scenario_catalog.json
   - cli_triage_module_covers_all_families
   - cli_triage_runbook_exists

## Validation
- 144 ffs-harness tests pass, 163 ffs-fuse tests pass
- clippy clean (-D warnings), fmt clean
- scenario_catalog.json validated","created_at":"2026-03-05T00:22:11Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","title":"Verification Gate: benchmark/regression governance (unit + e2e + logging audit)","description":"## Objective
Final acceptance gate for bd-h6nz.5 ensuring benchmark signals are reliable, reproducible, and actionable for engineers and operators.

## Required Validation
1. Unit tests for comparator/threshold logic, anti-flake hysteresis, and baseline selection behavior.
2. Deterministic E2E benchmark-guard runs across representative host profiles with machine-parseable pass/fail output.
3. Structured-log audit for regression decisions, confidence/effect-size evidence, and recommended next actions.

## Required Logging Detail
- Regression logs include benchmark_id, profile_id, baseline_ref, confidence metrics, and decision rationale.
- Borderline outcomes log hysteresis state and rerun counts.
- Guard-failure logs include exact follow-up commands for confirmation runs.

## Gate Commands
- rch exec -- cargo test --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-harness -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo bench -p ffs-harness
- benchmark guard E2E scripts for pass/fail + triage report validation

## Acceptance Criteria
- Comparator distinguishes real regressions from noise with documented evidence.
- Guard failures include actionable diagnostics and deterministic repro commands.
- Runbook and tooling remain synchronized with observed benchmark behavior.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.284494776Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:09:32.731565755Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_benchmarking","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:03:17.258249079Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.284494776Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.284494776Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.284494776Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.284494776Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.284494776Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.284494776Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.9.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:09:32.731522655Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":344,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.5.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Mandatory closure checklist (verification):
- Comprehensive unit tests updated (happy path + edge + error).
- Deterministic E2E scripts updated with scenario IDs and machine-parseable pass/fail output.
- Structured logging added/validated at critical transitions and failure boundaries; key log markers asserted in tests.
- Gate evidence captured via rch-offloaded checks/tests and attached in closure comment.","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:00:16Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.6","title":"EPIC: Formal Open-Question Closure and Decision Capture","description":"# EPIC: Formal Open-Question Closure and Decision Capture

## Problem Statement
The comprehensive spec tracks open questions (OQ1..OQ7). Leaving these unresolved creates drift risk: implementation may proceed with implicit assumptions that are not documented, not testable, and not auditable.

## Why this matters
FrankenFS is spec-first. Unresolved questions in critical areas (native-mode boundaries, conflict policy, symbol invalidation, persistence format, etc.) must become explicit decisions with evidence, loss tradeoffs, and integration plans.

## Scope
1. Close each OQ with a decision record (what, why, alternatives rejected).
2. Attach concrete verification and migration implications.
3. Convert accepted decisions into executable tasks and dependencies.
4. Keep parity/spec docs synchronized with implementation reality.

## Done Criteria
- OQ1..OQ7 each have an explicit accepted state (or explicit defer rationale).
- Decision artifacts link to tests/benchmarks where applicable.
- No architecture-critical behavior remains "implied but undocumented".","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:49:17.241917024Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:00:03.891145751Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_oq_closure"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:49:17.241917024Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":300,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Future-self note:

 {"id":"bd-h6nz.6.1","title":"OQ1 closure: Native-mode on-disk boundary and mutation contract","description":"## Objective
Close OQ1 by defining exact boundaries between compatibility-mode interpretation of ext4/btrfs images and FrankenFS native-mode mutation/storage semantics.

## Key Questions
1. What bytes may FrankenFS mutate in compatibility mode?
2. How are native-only structures/versioning stored without violating compatibility promises?
3. What opt-in controls are required before native mutations are allowed?

## Deliverables
- Decision record with alternatives and expected-loss tradeoffs.
- Explicit compatibility contract language for docs/CLI.
- Testable invariants for mode-boundary enforcement.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Boundary rules are explicit and unambiguous.
- Docs and runtime mode flags reflect the same contract.
- At least one enforcement test exists for accidental boundary crossing.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.
## Decision-Closure Validation Addendum
Because this bead may produce policy/spec decisions before code lands, closure requires:
1. An executable validation matrix mapping each accepted decision to concrete unit-test and E2E scenarios.
2. Explicit follow-on implementation beads (or updates to existing beads) carrying those scenarios into code/tests.
3. Structured logging expectations for decision-sensitive branches (required fields + failure classes).
4. Evidence that no accepted policy remains without a corresponding testable implementation path.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:04.044388116Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:10:00.199500091Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_oq_closure","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:04.044388116Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":310,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):
